name: Wintergreen Acquisition Corp.
summary: Wintergreen Acquisition Corp. is a blank check SPAC incorporated in the Cayman Islands on April 29, 2024, focused on effecting a business combination primarily targeting businesses in Asia. It completed a $50 million IPO in May 2025. In November 2025, it entered a merger agreement with KIKA Technology Inc., a provider of AdTech Dynamic Matching Technology services operating through its Hong Kong subsidiary, Time Point Technology Co., Limited.
